description: Depth model specification -- semantic slot taxonomy (sky, back_wall, midground, subject, near_fg), default Z-positions per Section 4.1, rules for per-geometry slot overrides (tunnel uses floor/ceiling/walls instead of the default taxonomy), and the position_override escape hatch in the manifest for edge cases per AP-08 (do not hard-code the depth model).
notes: Tier 1 contract. Defines the semantic mapping from slot names to 3D positions that all geometries implement. Spec defines: DepthSlot/SlotSet types, DEFAULT_SLOT_TAXONOMY (5 slots), PlaneOverride partial-merge escape hatch, validatePlaneSlots and resolveSlotTransform functions. Geometry registry deferred to OBJ-005; manifest plane types deferred to OBJ-010.
